rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Heart (24) shows where things already stand: the need to choose what aligns with your core values. Here, Heart emphasizes what still feels genuinely meaningful, and the part of the path that remains emotionally true. Present turns on Child (13), bringing the theme that a new beginning needs light structure to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Heart (24) and Child (13) reveal the deeper logic of the path, and it points to a blend of love and beginning, asking you to speak and act from authentic care while staying alert to underestimating complexity. Child (13) is the real hinge in this spread. Here, Child emphasizes fresh perspective can reset stale assumptions. Heart (24) with Child (13) keep emphasizing a blend of love and beginning, asking you to speak and act from authentic care while staying alert to underestimating complexity.
